rules.message: Filing CV-CR-163 requires companion form CV-CR-162.
Filing CV-CR-163 requires companion form CV-CR-JV-165.

then.suggest: A court time like this without AM/PM is almost always PM — confirm 'The parties good faith credible estimate of the time required for the trial is' is PM, not AM.

rules.message: 'The parties good faith credible estimate of the time required for the trial is' looks like an early-hour time with no AM/PM; court times are almost always PM — confirm.
